title: Fig Leaves
writer: Howard Hawks, Hope Loring, Louis D. Lighton
actors: George O'Brien, Olive Borden, Phyllis Haver
plot: In the modern day (1920s) story, Adam, a plumber, is happily married to Eve, a wardrobe-obsessed housewife, until she accidentally meets a supercilious fashion designer. At the prompting of her neighbour, who has secret designs on...
